name: register_podman_mcp
description: Standalone registration of any podman-isolated MCP (godaddy-mcp, taskmaster-mcp, no-proof-deployer, forged helpers like no_proof_deployer_helper-mcp) into ~/.grok/config.toml. Uses desired-effect (name + image + envs). Implements/uses buildPodmanStdioConfig logic (from claude research), writes [mcp_servers.<name>], makes discoverable. Reusable; called by forge_and_wire and add_podman_mcp. Compact invocation style supported.

steps.description: Construct {command: 'podman', args: ['run', '-i', '--rm', ... -e KEY=val, image ] } using verified pattern from current config (vercel/no_proof sections) and claude-code podman.ts research.
Use write/search_replace on /home/nicsins/.grok/config.toml to add or update [mcp_servers.<name>] section with command/args/startup_timeout_sec. Real file edit.

Re-read config; run podman images to confirm image; if MCP server process reloads, use search_tool for <name>__ tools. Test basic podman run -i --rm <image> if interactive possible. Confirm in ls ~/.grok/tasks/ if TASK emitted.
Ensure visible to /home/nicsins/workdir/bin/task and taskmaster-mcp (list_available_tasks will include new if TASK json present). Chain to execute_symbiotic_task.

ties_to: add_podman_mcp.json (core pattern), forge_and_wire_mcp, no_proof_deployer_helper section in config (real example), ~/.grok/config.toml, podman build outputs, taskmaster-mcp/godaddy-mcp sources
symbiotic: Foundation for all podman swarm (issues #2/3/4). Used by forge outputs, full_no_proof_deploy, execute_symbiotic_task. Enables dynamic addition of mcp-server enhancements, explorer, GitHub storage.
